title: ZG About / Team
description: Two-column About section with story copy, founder photos, exterior image, and 'Why Choose Us' card.

paragraph1.default: Founded in 2016, Zero Gravity Aesthetics & Wellness was built on a simple belief: everyone deserves access to safe, effective aesthetic care delivered by medical professionals — not just aestheticians.

paragraph2.default: Co-founded by Candace Reusch, MSN, APRN, FNP-C and Jennifer Walsh, RN, our clinic brings 20+ years of combined nursing expertise to every single treatment. We operate on medical integrity — honest consultations, real results.
